title: Paredes should not be suspended - Spain's Gavi
summary: Spain midfielder Gavi has called for Argentina's Leandro Paredes not to be suspended for his role in a post-World Cup final confrontation. His comments add weight to arguments opposing further disciplinary action and highlight differing views on the appropriate response to the incident.
content: Spain midfielder Gavi says he does not think Argentina's Leandro Paredes should be suspended for his part in the confrontation after the World Cup final.

zh.title: 帕雷德斯不应被禁赛 - 西班牙球星加维发声
zh.summary: 西班牙中场球员加维呼吁不要对阿根廷球员莱昂德罗·帕雷德斯因世界杯决赛后的冲突而进行禁赛处罚。他的言论为反对进一步纪律处分的观点增添了支持,并突显了人们对如何处理这一事件的不同看法。

title: Ipswich sign Diop from Fulham
summary: Ipswich Town have signed Morocco international Issa Diop from Fulham for an undisclosed fee, strengthening their defence. The transfer brings top-flight experience to the club as they prepare for the upcoming season.
content: Ipswich Town sign Morocco defender Issa Diop from Fulham for an undisclosed fee.

zh.title: 伊普斯维奇从富勒姆签下迪奥普
zh.summary: 伊普斯维奇镇队以未公开的转会费从富勒姆签下摩洛哥国际球员伊萨·迪奥普,进一步加强球队防线。这笔转会为俱乐部带来顶级联赛经验,帮助他们为新赛季做好准备。

title: Foden signs new four-year Man City contract
summary: Manchester City midfielder Phil Foden has signed a new four-year contract extension keeping him at the club until 2030. The deal underscores City's commitment to one of their key players and signals stability in their squad planning.
content: Manchester City midfielder Phil Foden signs a new four-year contract with the club, extending his stay until 2030.

zh.title: 福登与曼城续约四年
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特城中场球员菲尔·福登与俱乐部签署了新的四年合同延期,合同将在2030年到期。这笔交易体现了曼城对这位关键球员的重视,也预示着球队阵容规划的稳定性。

title: Liverpool issue bans as £1.2m seized from ticket touts
summary: Liverpool has issued hundreds of lifetime bans following police seizure of over £1.2 million in assets related to illegal ticket sales. The crackdown demonstrates the club's commitment to eliminating ticket touting and protecting legitimate fans.
content: Liverpool issue hundreds of lifetime bans after more than £1.2m of assets relating to the illegal selling of tickets was seized by police.

zh.title: 利物浦向黄牛党没收120万英镑后发布禁令
zh.summary: 利物浦在警方没收超120万英镑的非法售票相关资产后，已发布数百项终身禁令。这次打击行动彰显了俱乐部致力于消除黄牛党现象并保护合法球迷的承诺。

title: Wrexham to appoint Newcastle's Nickson as sporting director
summary: Steve Nickson is set to leave Newcastle United's recruitment department to become sporting director of Championship side Wrexham. The appointment brings Premier League experience to the Welsh club's management structure.
content: Steve Nickson is poised to leave his role as head of recruitment at Newcastle United to become sporting director of Championship club Wrexham.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆将任命纽卡斯尔的尼克森为体育总监
zh.summary: 史蒂夫·尼克森将离开纽卡斯尔联队的招聘部门，成为英冠球队雷克瑟姆的体育总监。这项任命为这家威尔士俱乐部的管理结构带来了英超经验。

title: Southampton boss Eckert charged by FA over Spygate
summary: Southampton manager Tonda Eckert has been charged by the Football Association in connection with the Spygate scandal. The disciplinary action follows investigations into alleged illegal surveillance activities linked to the club.
content: Southampton head coach Tonda Eckert is charged by the Football Association for his role in the Spygate scandal.

zh.title: 南安普顿主帅埃克特因"监听门"被足协起诉
zh.summary: 南安普顿主管托恩达·埃克特因与"监听门"丑闻有关而被英足总起诉。这项纪律处分措施是在调查与该俱乐部相关的涉嫌非法监控活动之后进行的。

title: Financial exceptions could be made for Guardiola - Italian FA
summary: Pep Guardiola has held talks with the Italian Football Federation about becoming Italy's head coach, with officials indicating they would make financial exceptions to secure him. This represents a potential major shift in Italian football leadership as the federation pursues a transformative appointment.
content: Pep Guardiola has held talks about becoming Italy head coach, Italian Football Federation president Giovanni Malago has confirmed.

zh.title: 意大利足协可能为瓜迪奥拉做出财务例外
zh.summary: 佩普·瓜迪奥拉与意大利足球协会就成为意大利国家队主教练进行了会谈，官员们表示他们愿意做出财务例外来吸引他。这代表着意大利足球领导力的潜在重大转变，因为协会正在追求一项变革性的任命。

title: Arsenal make sixth summer signing as Spain keeper Rodriguez joins
summary: Arsenal Women have signed Spain goalkeeper Misa Rodriguez on a free transfer, marking their sixth summer signing. The goalkeeper strengthens the Women's Super League side's defensive options ahead of the new season.
content: Arsenal bring in Spain goalkeeper Misa Rodriguez on a free transfer - the Women's Super League side's sixth signing of the summer.

zh.title: 阿森纳签下西班牙门神罗德里格斯，成为第六笔夏季签约
zh.summary: 阿森纳女队以自由身签下西班牙门神米萨·罗德里格斯，这是她们第六笔夏季签约。这位门神为女超联赛球队加强了防线配置，为新赛季做好准备。

title: Where are Newcastle in bid to be the best by 2030?
summary: As Newcastle United approaches the fifth anniversary of its takeover, BBC Sport assesses whether the club's project to become "the best" by 2030 remains on track. The assessment measures the club's progress against its long-term ambitions and stated objectives.
content: As the fifth anniversary of Newcastle's takeover approaches, BBC Sport assesses whether the project to be "the best" is still on track.

zh.title: 纽卡斯尔在2030年成为最强球队的目标中进展如何？
zh.summary: 在纽卡斯尔联队接近其收购五周年之际，BBC体育评估了该俱乐部在2030年成为"最强"球队的项目是否仍在轨道上。该评估衡量了俱乐部在其长期目标和既定目标方面的进展。

title: Why will the September international break last three weeks?
summary: Starting in September 2026, football's international break schedule is undergoing significant changes that will extend that month's break to three weeks. The adjustment marks a major reorganization of the international calendar affecting the sport's fixture schedule.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explain the major changes happening to football's international breaks starting in September 2026

zh.title: 为什么九月的国际比赛日将持续三周?
zh.summary: 从2026年9月开始，足球的国际比赛日计划将经历重大变化，将该月的休赛期延长至三周。这一调整标志着影响体育赛程的国际赛历的重大重组。

title: Listen: Hearts flop in Europe, Maeda nears exit as Rangers rebuild continues
summary: Hearts suffered a European collapse in Graz while Rangers midfielder Daizen Maeda nears an exit from the Scottish club. The developments come amid Rangers' ongoing squad rebuild effort.
content: Hearts collapse in Graz, Maeda nears exit and Rangers keep rebuilding.

zh.title: 收听：哈茨在欧洲惨败，前田欲离，流浪者队继续重建
zh.summary: 哈茨队在格拉茨经历了欧洲赛事的崩盘，同时流浪者队中场球员前田大然即将离开这支苏格兰俱乐部。这些进展发生在流浪者队正在进行的球队重建过程中。

title: Newcastle closing in on Liverpool forward Kiernan
summary: Newcastle United are in advanced negotiations to sign Republic of Ireland forward Leanne Kiernan from Liverpool. The transfer would bolster Newcastle's attacking options.
content: Newcastle United are in advanced talks to sign Republic of Ireland forward Leanne Kiernan from Liverpool.

zh.title: 纽卡斯尔即将签下利物浦前锋基南
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔联队正在与利物浦进行高级谈判，以签下来自爱尔兰共和国的前锋利恩·基南。这笔转会将增强纽卡斯尔的进攻选择。

title: 'Baur agrees terms for £4m sale to Celtic' - gossip
summary: Paderborn's Mika Baur is poised to join Celtic in a £4 million deal as the transfer window sees multiple moves: Daizen Maeda to Ipswich Town and Vanja Dragojević to Rangers. The flurry of activity signals significant squad rotation across several clubs.
content: Celtic are reportedly poised to Paderborn's Mika Baur while agreeing a transfer to Ipswich Town for Daizen Maeda as Vanja Dragojević's switch to Rangers appears to be unofficially confirmed.

zh.title: '鲍尔同意以400万英镑出售给凯尔特人' - 传言
zh.summary: 帕德博恩的米卡·鲍尔即将以400万英镑的交易加入凯尔特人，转会窗口见证了多笔交易：前田大贤至伊普斯维奇镇和万迪亚·德拉戈耶维奇至流浪者队。这股交易活跃期表明多家俱乐部进行了大规模阵容轮换。

title: Why Chelsea have signed so many Man City academy graduates
summary: Chelsea continue their strategy of recruiting Manchester City academy graduates, with Morgan Rogers being the latest addition to the squad. Rogers will join several other former City youth academy players already at the club.
content: Morgan Rogers is the latest ex-Man City academy player to join Chelsea and will be reunited with more former City team-mates.

zh.title: 切尔西为何签下这么多曼城学院毕业生
zh.summary: 切尔西继续执行招募曼城学院毕业生的战略，摩根·罗杰斯是最新加入球队的球员。罗杰斯将加入已在俱乐部效力的其他几名前曼城青年学院球员。

title: Football Daily
summary: A trivia segment testing readers' knowledge of football culture and personalities, exploring connections between legendary figures and popular culture.
content: Fergie, chocolate and Beckham... which one is true?

zh.title: 足球日报
zh.summary: 一个测试读者对足球文化和人物知识的琐事片段，探索传奇人物与流行文化之间的联系。

title: Who am I? Guess Premier League star No 2
summary: An interactive Premier League player identification challenge where readers guess which star is being described, testing their knowledge of current top-flight players.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜猜英超明星第2号
zh.summary: 一个互动式英超球员识别挑战，读者需要猜测所描述的是哪位明星球员，测试他们对当前顶级联赛球员的知识。
